message:
fix: gofmt formatting and doctor test expectation for auto-initialized dolt

- gofmt: fix formatting in dolt_autocommit.go and migrate_wisps.go
- dolt_test: embedded dolt auto-initializes empty directories, so
  the "no database" health check returns OK, not error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
